topic: writing an IIO sensor/ADC driver skeleton
q: 写一个 IIO 传感器驱动,分配设备、填通道、注册,骨架怎么搭?

corruptions.why: 编造的分配函数,真名 devm_iio_device_alloc

forbidden: register 放在填好 channels/info 之前
rubric: devm_iio_device_alloc(dev,sizeof(state)) 分配,iio_priv 取私有数据;填 name/info(iio_info)/channels(iio_chan_spec)/num_channels;最后 devm_iio_device_register
